title: Travelers Lib
description: My library for adding animals and other helpful features
body:
# Travelers Lib

This is an generic animal library that i've made for mods i work for:
for instance New World or Jurassic Saga.

## What does it do?
- It helps registry of animals by using an animal attribute system
- New and improved async pathfinding tools
- Registry helper
- And more tools for my mods

## FAQ
### Will you make it for *insert version*
Most likely not, if i need to port mods i work for, i will port this library.

### Can you add *insert feature*
Please add it to suggestions in the right discord channels!
